title: Aerospace Truth Stack
summary: Aerospace covers aircraft, spacecraft, propulsion, flight dynamics, navigation, and the systems that let machines operate in the sky and beyond.
starterPack: Start with NASA and ESA as primary sources.
Use flight test and mission operations material.
Watch launch and mission explainers for systems intuition.

tiers.title: First Principles
tiers.description: The physical constraints behind flight and space systems.

items.name: Lift, drag, thrust, weight
items.description: The forces that make flight possible.

items.name: Reliability under extreme conditions
items.description: Aerospace systems must work in hostile environments.

items.name: Orbital mechanics
items.description: Spaceflight is motion under gravity and velocity.

tiers.title: Primary Authorities
tiers.description: The formal bodies that shape aerospace reality.

items.name: NASA
items.description: Primary civil space and aeronautics authority.

items.name: European Space Agency
items.description: Major international aerospace and space authority.

items.name: Civil Aviation Safety Authority
items.description: Australian aviation regulation and safety.

tiers.title: Mature Interpreters
tiers.description: Experienced explainers who make aerospace legible.

items.name: Chris Hadfield
items.description: Excellent public explanation of astronaut work.

items.name: Mike Massimino
items.description: Accessible and realistic spaceflight stories.

items.name: The Aerospace Corporation
items.description: Independent analysis on aerospace systems and space policy.

tiers.title: Practitioners
tiers.description: The jobs that make aerospace work.

items.name: Flight test engineers
items.description: Validate aircraft performance and safety.

items.name: Mission operations teams
items.description: Run spacecraft and manage in-flight systems.

items.name: Propulsion engineers
items.description: Design engines and thermal systems.

tiers.title: Institutions

items.name: NASA JPL

items.name: Airbus
items.description: Major commercial aerospace manufacturer.

items.name: RAAF Air Warfare Centre

tiers.title: Media and Publications
tiers.description: Useful reporting and analysis on the aerospace world.

items.name: Aviation Week
items.description: Industry news and analysis.

items.name: SpaceNews
items.description: Space industry reporting.

items.name: NASA Aeronautics
items.description: Primary source for aeronautics work.

tiers.title: Channels and Documentaries
tiers.description: Visual material that explains aerospace systems well.

items.name: NASA
items.description: Mission footage, explainers, and live events.

items.name: ESA

items.name: Primal Space

tiers.title: Frontier Watchlist
tiers.description: Aerospace areas to keep an eye on.

items.name: Reusable launch systems
